title: cystopteris myrrhidifolia
intro: Cystopteris myrrhidifolia, also known as Bladder Fern, is a species of fern native to Europe, Asia, and North America. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Cystopteris myrrhidifolia include its ability to treat various conditions such as digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also added to salves and ointments for topical application.
